---
title: "Thank You"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: false
page-layout: article
---

```{html{}
Copy code
<style>
.thank-you-container {
  max-width: 700px;
  margin: 6rem auto;
  padding: 3rem;
  background: #f7f7f7;
  border-radius: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  text-align: center;
}

.thank-you-container h1 {
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.thank-you-container p {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: #333;
}

.thank-you-container a {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 2rem;
  padding: 0.7rem 1.4rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #000087;
  color: white;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.thank-you-container a:hover {
  background: #2a2ad6;
}
</style>

<div class="thank-you-container">

<h1>Thank You for Reaching Out</h1>

<p>
Your message has been successfully sent. I appreciate you taking the time to get in touch,
and I will respond as soon as possible.
</p>

<p>
Whether your message relates to research, data visualization, collaboration, or general
inquiry, I look forward to continuing the conversation.
</p>

<a href="index.html">Return to Home</a>

</div>
